prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约10368名→9316名→8960名→27641名→11160名。2021–2023年呈小幅上升趋势（位次数字减小），2024年出现异常大幅后移（可能与当年云南省高考模式调整有关），2025年恢复至11160名，与2021–2023年区间基本一致，近两年基准位次约11160名；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为19人，2026年（招生计划文件）仍为19人，计划连续六年持平，无扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接弹性影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第65名，近年排名在59–72之间波动，2026年较2025年（第72名）有所回升，属于中上水平211院校；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，原因为一名拟录取研究生因发表不当言论被取消资格，事件对学校形象有一定负面影响；抖音热度为较热（总排名第57），短视频平台关注度中等偏上，未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科，工科基础扎实，对相关专业报考有稳定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在滇招生专业以土木类、交通运输类、环境类为主，社会专业热度整体分化观望；电子信息工程、自动化等少数专业热度较高但招生人数有限。云南省2026年普通高考总人数约37.79万，按近年物理类占比（约60.7%）估算物理类考生约22.92万，较2025年物理类17.33万增加约32.3%，考生规模大幅扩大将加剧竞争。2026年；北京工业大学位于北京市，在云南省招生人数较少（每年仅19人），属于典型跨省招生，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在2025年已回归至11160名正常区间、2026年招生计划持平、但云南省物理类考生规模大幅增加约32.3%等因素，竞争加剧将推动最低录取位次后移。同时学校声誉偏负面有轻微抑制效应，专业热度分化整体吸引力一般。在2025年基准11160名基础上，预测2026年最低录取位次约11510名，区间11010–12010名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息工程（校本部）
- 自动化（校本部）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 交通运输类（实验班）（交通工程、交通设备与控制工程）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、环境科学）
- 土木工程（茅以升班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 土木类（土木工程、给排水科学与工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程）
- 城乡规划。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11010–12010名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如11000名以内）可重点冲刺电子信息工程、自动化等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（12000名左右）应以三档专业保底，避免滑档。该校所有专业均要求首选物理、再选化学，选科不符的考生无法报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 10368 → 9316 → 8960 → 27641 → 11160. From 2021 to 2023, there was a slight upward trend (decreasing rank numbers). In 2024, there was an abnormal large backward shift (possibly related to the adjustment of Yunnan Province's college entrance examination model that year). In 2025, it recovered to 11160, basically consistent with the 2021–2023 range. The recent two-year baseline ranking is approximately 11160. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Yunnan Province was 19 students from 2021 to 2025, and remains 19 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). The plan has been stable for six consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct elastic impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 65th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 59 and 72. In 2026, it has rebounded compared to 2025 (72nd), belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, due to an incident where a prospective graduate student was disqualified for making inappropriate remarks, which had a certain negative impact on the university's image. On Douyin, its popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 57), with medium-to-high attention on short video platforms, and no obvious record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering received an A rating, while Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering received A- ratings, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above. The engineering foundation is solid, providing stable support for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Yunnan are mainly in civil engineering, transportation, and environmental fields, with overall social popularity showing divergence and wait-and-see attitudes. A few majors such as Electronic Information Engineering and Automation are highly popular but have limited enrollment numbers. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Yunnan Province is approximately 377,900. Based on the recent proportion of physics category candidates (about 60.7%), the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 229,200, an increase of approximately 32.3% compared to 173,300 in 2025. The significant expansion of the candidate pool will intensify competition. In 2026, Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, with a small enrollment number in Yunnan Province (only 19 per year), typical of cross-provincial enrollment, with no local enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the historical ranking has returned to the normal range of 11160 in 2025, the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, but the number of physics category candidates in Yunnan Province has increased significantly by about 32.3%, intensified competition will push the minimum admission ranking backward. At the same time, the slightly negative reputation of the university has a mild inhibitory effect, and the divergence in major popularity results in generally average overall appeal. Based on the 2025 baseline of 11160, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 11510, with a range of 11010–12010.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Main Campus)
- Automation (Main Campus)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Transportation (Experimental Class) (Traffic Engineering, Traffic Equipment and Control Engineering)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science)
- Civil Engineering (Mao Yisheng Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering)
- Urban and Rural Planning.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11010–12010, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11000), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Electronic Information Engineering and Automation. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 12000), you should rely on Tier 3 majors as safety to avoid slipping. All majors at this university require first-choice Physics and second-choice Chemistry; candidates whose subject selection does not meet these requirements cannot apply.
